name: secretscan
description: SecretScan — Real-time secret and credential detector. Scans text for API keys, tokens, private keys, database URLs, and 50+ other secret formats. Redacts findings with safe placeholders.

tools.name: secretscan_scan
tools.description: Scan text for secrets. Returns findings with severity, pattern name, and fingerprint. Does NOT return the actual secret value.

tools.name: secretscan_expand
tools.description: Retrieve the original value of a redacted secret by its fingerprint. Only works if the secret was detected in this session.

tools.name: secretscan_allow
tools.description: Add a fingerprint to the allowlist so it won't be flagged again.

reason.description: Why this is safe to ignore

tools.name: secretscan_stats
tools.description: Show SecretScan statistics: total scans, secrets found, by severity breakdown.
